member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.HealthController
member.summary: Health check endpoint — confirms the service and its dependencies are alive. Used by load balancers, Kubernetes liveness/readiness probes, and monitoring tools.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.HealthController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.HealthChecks.HealthCheckService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.HealthController.GetHealth(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the aggregated health status of the service and all registered checks.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication API — version 1. Handles JWT login, refresh token rotation, and token revocation. These endpoints are excluded from HMAC auth and rate limiting.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.AuthController.#ctor(EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IAuthService,FluentValidation.IValidator{EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.LoginRequest},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.AuthController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.AuthController.Login(EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.LoginRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT access token plus a refresh token.
member.returns: 200 — tokens issued. 400 — validation failure. 401 — invalid credentials.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.AuthController.RefreshToken(EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.RefreshTokenRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Issues a new access token using a valid refresh token (token rotation).
member.returns: 200 — new tokens issued, old refresh token revoked. 401 — invalid or expired refresh token.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.AuthController.RevokeToken(EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.RefreshTokenRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revokes a refresh token, preventing it from being used again.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.FilesController
member.summary: File Upload API — version 1. Provides stream-based file upload directly to Azure Blob Storage. Files are never fully buffered in application memory.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.FilesController.#ctor(EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IBlobStorageService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.FilesController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.FilesController.UploadFile(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a file using multipart streaming — no buffering in memory. Validates content type and file size before upload.
member.returns: 200 — file uploaded, blob URL returned. 400 — invalid file type or size exceeded. 401 — unauthenticated. 500 — upload failure.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.LimitedStream
member.summary: Stream wrapper that enforces a maximum read size and tracks bytes read.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.OrdersController
member.summary: Orders API — version 1. Handles order placement with multi-table transaction support (Order + Stock + Outbox).

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.OrdersController.#ctor(EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IOrderService,FluentValidation.IValidator{EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.PlaceOrderRequest},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.OrdersController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.OrdersController.PlaceOrder(EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.PlaceOrderRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Places a new order for a customer, updating stock atomically.
member.param: Order placement payload containing customer ID and line items.
member.returns: 201 — order created. 400 — validation failure or insufficient stock. 401 — unauthenticated. 404 — one or more products not found. 500 — unexpected error.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.OrdersController.GetOrder(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a single order by its unique identifier.
member.returns: 200 — order found. 404 — order not found. 401 — unauthenticated.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.ProductsController
member.summary: Products API — version 1. Provides CRUD operations for the product catalog. All write operations use EF Core; all reads use Dapper via the query service.
Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.ProductsController.GetProducts(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of active products.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.ProductsController.GetProduct(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single product by its unique identifier.
member.returns: 200 — product found. 404 — product not found. 401 — unauthenticated.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.ProductsController.CreateProduct(EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.CreateProductRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new product in the catalog.
member.returns: 201 — product created, Location header set. 400 — validation failure. 401 — unauthenticated.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Controllers.V1.ProductsController.UpdateProduct(System.Guid,EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.UpdateProductRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing product's name, description, and price.
member.returns: 200 — product updated. 400 — validation failure. 404 — product not found. 409 — concurrency conflict. 401 — unauthenticated.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods that register all application services in Program.cs.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDatabase(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers EF Core DbContext.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddRepositories(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers all domain repositories (EF Core — write only).

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddQueryServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers all Dapper read-only query services.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddApplicationServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers all application services.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddValidators(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers FluentValidation validators.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddRedis(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers Redis distributed cache and rate limiter.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddJwtAuthentication(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers JWT Bearer authentication.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddBlobStorage(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers Azure Blob Storage client.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSecretProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers Azure Key Vault secret provider.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddOutboxProcessor(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers the Outbox background processor.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddEnterpriseHealthChecks(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers health checks for SQL Server and Redis.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.CorrelationIdMiddleware
member.summary: Enriches every request with a Correlation ID and logs request start/end with timing. The correlation ID is taken from the incoming X-Correlation-ID header or generated fresh. It is pushed into Serilog's LogContext so all downstream log entries carry it.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.CorrelationIdMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.CorrelationIdMiddleware})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.CorrelationIdMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes the request, injecting and propagating the correlation ID.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.GlobalExceptionMiddleware
member.summary: Global exception handling middleware. Catches all unhandled exceptions and maps them to appropriate HTTP status codes with a uniform response envelope. Internal exception details are never exposed to the client.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.GlobalExceptionMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.GlobalExceptionMiddleware})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.GlobalExceptionMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes the HTTP request and catches any unhandled exceptions.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.HmacAuthenticationMiddleware
member.summary: Validates HMAC-SHA256 signatures on incoming requests. Clients must include: X-Api-Key — the client's public API key X-Timestamp — Unix timestamp (UTC) within 5-minute window X-Signature — HMAC-SHA256(method + path + timestamp + body, sharedSecret) This prevents replay attacks and message tampering.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.HmacAuthenticationMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.HmacAuthenticationMiddleware})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.API.Middleware.HmacAuthenticationMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.ISecretProvider)
member.summary: Validates the HMAC signature on the request.
